meaning: adj.冷酷无情的,顽固的,执拗的
examples: Mixed with obdurate pride and steadfast hate.
Even obdurate India has begun to look less of an outlier.
Among big countries, perhaps only America and Russia are considered more obdurate.
He took ten years to come to terms with a very obdurate and highly original painter.
Although the fifth-wicket partnership offered obdurate defence, it was the deception of Swann which earned it.
